title: Keraudrenia nephrosperma
taxonomy: Keraudrenia nephrosperma is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It belongs to the genus Keraudrenia, which is a group of plants primarily found in Madagascar. Keraudrenia nephrosperma is further classified under the subfamily Acalyphoideae, which includes many euphorbiaceous plants. The classification is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and molecular characteristics. Further research is necessary to confirm its exact classification within the Euphorbiaceae family.
